gold_sql: SELECT T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID, COUNT(T3.INCOME_ID) FROM DIM_HOUSEHOLD AS T1 JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD_SOCIAL AS T2 ON T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID JOIN DIM_LIVELIHOOD_INCOME AS T3 ON T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID WHERE T2.CASTE_RELIGION_GROUP_8_CATEGORY = 'OBC' GROUP BY T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID HAVING AVG(T2.SOCIAL_ID) > 1 ORDER BY MAX(T2.HOUSEHOLD_ASSETS_INDEX) DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT dh.household_id, dh.household_number_of_workers, dli.household_total_income
FROM dim_household dh
JOIN dim_household_social dhs ON dh.household_id = dhs.household_id
JOIN dim_livelihood_income dli ON dh.household_id = dli.household_id
WHERE dhs.caste_religion_group_8_category ILIKE 'obc'
  AND dhs.social_id > (SELECT AVG(social_id) FROM dim_household_social)
ORDER BY dhs.household_assets_index DESC

शहरी आणि ग्रामीण भागातील सरासरी मासिक अन्नेतर खर्च आणि प्रति व्यक्ती उपभोगाची तुलना करा, फक्त त्या प्रदेशांवर लक्ष केंद्रित करा जिथे सरासरी अन्नेतर खर्च ६६ रुपयांपेक्षा जास्त आहे, आणि निकाल उपभोगाच्या पातळीनुसार क्रमवारी लावा.
gold_sql: SELECT T2.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL, AVG(T1.MONTHLY_NON_FOOD_EXPENDITURE_RS) AS col_2, AVG(T1.MONTHLY_CONSUMPTION_PER_CAPITA) AS col_4 FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CONSUMPTION AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID INNER JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD AS T3 ON T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID WHERE T2.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL IN ('Rural', 'Urban') GROUP BY T2.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL HAVING AVG(T1.MONTHLY_NON_FOOD_EXPENDITURE_RS) > 66 ORDER BY col_4 DESC
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    dgh.census_2001_urban_rural,
    AVG(fhc.monthly_non_food_expenditure_rs) AS avg_monthly_non_food_expenditure,
    AVG(fhc.monthly_consumption_per_capita) AS avg_monthly_consumption_per_capita
FROM fact_household_consumption fhc
JOIN dim_geography_hierarchy dgh ON fhc.geography_id = dgh.geography_id
GROUP BY dgh.census_2001_urban_rural
HAVING AVG(fhc.monthly_non_food_expenditure_rs) > 66
ORDER BY avg_monthly_consumption_per_capita;
raw_output:
SELECT 
    dgh.census_2001_urban_rural,
    AVG(fhc.monthly_non_food_expenditure_rs) AS avg_monthly_non_food_expenditure,
    AVG(fhc.monthly_consumption_per_capita) AS avg_monthly_consumption_per_capita
FROM fact_household_consumption fhc
JOIN dim_geography_hierarchy dgh ON fhc.geography_id = dgh.geography_id
GROUP BY dgh.census_2001_urban_rural
HAVING AVG(fhc.monthly_non_food_expenditure_rs) > 66
ORDER BY avg_monthly_consumption_per_capita;
error: Mismatch (Order matters: True). Gold count: 2. Pred count: 2.

gold_sql: SELECT T2.DISTRICT_CODE FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CONSUMPTION AS T1 JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD AS T3 ON T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID WHERE T2.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL = 'Rural' GROUP BY T2.DISTRICT_CODE HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN T1.MONTHLY_TOTAL_CONSUMPTION_EXPENDITURE_RS < 500 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) >= 1 AND MAX(T1.MONTHLY_NON_FOOD_EXPENDITURE_RS) > 2000 ORDER BY T2.DISTRICT_CODE ASC

question: कोणत्या जाती आणि धर्म गटांमध्ये तांदूळ, गहू आणि डाळींच्या एकत्रित सरासरी खर्चाची रक्कम ५० रुपयांपेक्षा जास्त आहे? हे गट आणि त्यांचे सरासरी खर्च उतरत्या क्रमाने सूचीबद्ध करा.
gold_sql: SELECT T2.CASTE_RELIGION_GROUP_8_CATEGORY, AVG(T3.CONSUMPTION_RICE_EXPENDITURE_RS + T3.CONSUMPTION_WHEAT_EXPENDITURE_RS + T3.CONSUMPTION_PULSES_EXPENDITURE_RS) FROM DIM_HOUSEHOLD AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD_SOCIAL AS T2 ON T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID INNER JOIN FACT_FOOD_CONSUMPTION AS T3 ON T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID GROUP BY T2.CASTE_RELIGION_GROUP_8_CATEGORY HAVING AVG(T3.CONSUMPTION_RICE_EXPENDITURE_RS + T3.CONSUMPTION_WHEAT_EXPENDITURE_RS + T3.CONSUMPTION_PULSES_EXPENDITURE_RS) > 50 ORDER BY AVG(T3.CONSUMPTION_RICE_EXPENDITURE_RS + T3.CONSUMPTION_WHEAT_EXPENDITURE_RS + T3.CONSUMPTION_PULSES_EXPENDITURE_RS) DESC
predicted_sql:
SELECT hs.caste_religion_group_8_category, AVG(fc.consumption_rice_expenditure_rs + fc.consumption_wheat_expenditure_rs + fc.consumption_pulses_expenditure_rs) AS avg_combined_expenditure
FROM dim_household_social hs
JOIN fact_food_consumption fc ON hs.household_id = fc.household_id
GROUP BY hs.caste_religion_group_8_category
HAVING AVG(fc.consumption_rice_expenditure_rs + fc.consumption_wheat_expenditure_rs + fc.consumption_pulses_expenditure_rs) > 50
ORDER BY avg_combined_expenditure DESC;
raw_output:
SELECT hs.caste_religion_group_8_category, AVG(fc.consumption_rice_expenditure_rs + fc.consumption_wheat_expenditure_rs + fc.consumption_pulses_expenditure_rs) AS avg_combined_expenditure
FROM dim_household_social hs
JOIN fact_food_consumption fc ON hs.household_id = fc.household_id
GROUP BY hs.caste_religion_group_8_category
HAVING AVG(fc.consumption_rice_expenditure_rs + fc.consumption_wheat_expenditure_rs + fc.consumption_pulses_expenditure_rs) > 50
